q36_sql:
SELECT "administrative.year" AS "Năm", 
       SUM(CASE WHEN "reason.lackCapital" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Thiếu vốn", 
       SUM(CASE WHEN "reason.lackProductionLand" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Thiếu đất sản xuất" 
FROM households 
WHERE "administrative.district" ILIKE '%Đắk Mil%' AND "administrative.year" = 2024 
GROUP BY "administrative.year";
q37_sql:
SELECT "administrative.year" AS "Năm", "administrative.commune" AS "Xã", 
       COUNT(CASE WHEN classify = 'Hộ nghèo' THEN 1 END) AS "Số hộ nghèo", 
       COUNT(CASE WHEN classify = 'Hộ cận nghèo' THEN 1 END) AS "Số hộ cận nghèo" 
FROM households 
WHERE "administrative.year" = 2024 AND "administrative.district" ILIKE '%Gia Nghĩa%' 
GROUP BY "administrative.year", "administrative.commune";
q38_sql:
SELECT "administrative.district" AS "Huyện", COUNT(*) AS "Tổng số hộ nghèo và cận nghèo" 
FROM households 
WHERE "administrative.year" = 2024 
GROUP BY "administrative.district" 
ORDER BY "Tổng số hộ nghèo và cận nghèo" DESC 
LIMIT 5;
q39_sql:
SELECT "administrative.commune" AS "Xã", COUNT(*) AS "Số hộ cận nghèo" 
FROM households 
WHERE classify = 'Hộ cận nghèo' AND "administrative.district" ILIKE '%Tuy Đức%' AND "administrative.year" = 2024 
GROUP BY "administrative.commune";
q40_sql: SELECT "administrative.year" AS "Năm", ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN classify = 'Hộ nghèo' AND "deprivation.cleanWater" = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(CASE WHEN classify = 'Hộ nghèo' THEN 1 END), 2) AS "Tỷ trọng hộ nghèo thiếu hụt nước sinh hoạt hợp vệ sinh (%)" FROM households WHERE "administrative.district" ILIKE '%Đắk Song%' AND "administrative.year" = 2024 GROUP BY "administrative.year";
